h2.visual_description: All-caps, blue-colored sans-serif font, left-aligned, larger than body text with significant leading space.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Footnote text located at the bottom of the page, starting with a numeric identifier.
Page footer containing the page number followed by the author's name.
Indented block quotation, often starting with bracketed text and ending with a page reference.
Superscript numeric citation markers within the body text.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-date style (e.g., 'Vohs et al. (2006)') integrated into the narrative.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number and author name at the bottom-left margin; footnotes clustered at the bottom of the page.
